heroBio: Lockslip is an LA based metallic hardcore band composed of vocalist Sara G, guitarists TJ Jaeger and Nick Pinder, bassist Enrique Isla-Eisenacher, and drummer Noah Baxter.
bio: Lockslip is a metallic hardcore band from Los Angeles. They released their self-titled debut EP in 2024, which blends punishing breakdowns, complex rhythms, and nonstop ferocity.
Lockslip is vocalist Sara G, guitarists TJ Jaeger and Nick Pinder, bassist Enrique Isla-Eisenacher, and drummer Noah Baxter.
